context: Tests creation of a canvas with a group node that visually contains child text nodes within its bounds.

checklist.name: Group node present with type=group
checklist.description: The canvas contains at least one node with type set to group and a label field

checklist.name: Three text nodes inside group bounds
checklist.description: All three text nodes have x and y coordinates that place them fully within the group's x/y/width/height rectangle

checklist.name: All node IDs are unique 16-char hex
checklist.description: Every node has an id that is exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters, and all four IDs are distinct

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: The canvas file content is syntactically valid JSON with no parse errors
